description: Phase 4.1 stale gate cleanup fixture — Move-HeliosStaleGateArtifacts.ps1 behavior verification

fixture_expired_gate.note: This gate has expires_utc in the past and should be moved to stale/

expected_behavior.orphaned_inflight_gate: MOVED to stale/ if older than InflightMaxAgeMinutes (default: 30)
expected_behavior.non_gate_files: FLAGGED with warning but not moved

code_review_findings: Correctly parses expires_utc from gate JSON and compares to current UTC
Creates stale/ directory on-demand only when needed
Handles JSON parse errors gracefully with SKIPPED status
Separate logic for pending/ (TTL-based) and inflight/ (age-based)
Returns structured results array with per-file status
phase40_test_coverage: Test #5 (stale gate) — TTL enforcement and cleanup lifecycle
result: PASS — code review confirms correct stale gate detection, movement, and edge case handling
